allow: Bash(node -e "const s = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('data/store.json','utf8'\)\); const fresh = s.games.filter\(g => g.trend?.source === 'sportsgameodds'\); console.log\('fresh from new API:', fresh.length\); console.log\('sample:', JSON.stringify\(fresh[0], null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const s = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('data/store.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('history entries:', s.history.length\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(s.history, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./data/store.json'\); const today=new Intl.DateTimeFormat\('en-CA',{timeZone:'America/New_York',year:'numeric',month:'2-digit',day:'2-digit'}\).format\(new Date\(\)\); console.log\('today ET:',today\); const todays=s.games.filter\(g=>new Intl.DateTimeFormat\('en-CA',{timeZone:'America/New_York',year:'numeric',month:'2-digit',day:'2-digit'}\).format\(new Date\(g.startTime\)\)===today\); console.log\('todays count:',todays.length\); console.log\('statuses:',todays.reduce\(\(a,g\)=>{a[g.status]=\(a[g.status]||0\)+1;return a;},{}\)\); console.log\('finals:',todays.filter\(g=>g.status==='final'\).map\(g=>\({id:g.id,away:g.away.abbr,home:g.home.abbr,start:g.startTime,status:g.status}\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./data/store.json'\); console.log\('lastUpdated:',s.lastUpdated\); console.log\('totals statuses:',s.games.reduce\(\(a,g\)=>{a[g.status]=\(a[g.status]||0\)+1;return a;},{}\)\); const now=Date.now\(\); const past=s.games.filter\(g=>new Date\(g.startTime\).getTime\(\)<now\); console.log\('games started in past:',past.length\); console.log\(past.slice\(0,10\).map\(g=>\({id:g.id,start:g.startTime,status:g.status,score:g.home.score+'-'+g.away.score}\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./data/store.json'\); const today=new Intl.DateTimeFormat\('en-CA',{timeZone:'America/New_York',year:'numeric',month:'2-digit',day:'2-digit'}\).format\(new Date\(\)\); const todays=s.games.filter\(g=>new Intl.DateTimeFormat\('en-CA',{timeZone:'America/New_York',year:'numeric',month:'2-digit',day:'2-digit'}\).format\(new Date\(g.startTime\)\)===today\); console.log\('today ET:',today,'count:',todays.length,'statuses:',todays.reduce\(\(a,g\)=>{a[g.status]=\(a[g.status]||0\)+1;return a;},{}\)\); console.log\('lastUpdated:',s.lastUpdated\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./data/store.json'\); const all=s.games.reduce\(\(a,g\)=>{const d=new Intl.DateTimeFormat\('en-CA',{timeZone:'America/New_York',year:'numeric',month:'2-digit',day:'2-digit'}\).format\(new Date\(g.startTime\)\); a[d]=a[d]||{}; a[d][g.status]=\(a[d][g.status]||0\)+1; return a;},{}\); console.log\(all\); console.log\('history:', s.history.slice\(0,7\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./data/store.json'\); const all=s.games.reduce\(\(a,g\)=>{const d=new Intl.DateTimeFormat\('en-CA',{timeZone:'America/New_York',year:'numeric',month:'2-digit',day:'2-digit'}\).format\(new Date\(g.startTime\)\); a[d]=a[d]||{}; a[d][g.status]=\(a[d][g.status]||0\)+1; return a;},{}\); console.log\('by ET date:',all\); console.log\(\); console.log\('history:'\); for\(const h of s.history.slice\(0,7\)\) console.log\(' ',h.date,'pub',h.publicWins,'veg',h.vegasWins,'push',h.pushes,'games',h.games.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./data/store.json'\); console.log\('history:'\); for\(const h of s.history.slice\(0,7\)\) console.log\(' ',h.date,'pub',h.publicWins,'veg',h.vegasWins,'push',h.pushes,'games',h.games.length\);")
